products.title: Apple MacBook Pro 14-inch M3
products.description: Apple MacBook Pro with M3 chip, 14-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, 18GB RAM, 512GB SSD. Supercharged for pros with incredible performance and all-day battery life.

products.title: Samsung 65-Inch 4K QLED Smart TV
products.description: Samsung 65-inch Class Q80C QLED 4K Smart TV with Quantum HDR, Object Tracking Sound, and AI-powered upscaling for stunning picture quality.

products.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with Auto NC Optimizer. Crystal clear hands-free calling with 4 beamforming microphones. Up to 30-hour battery life.

products.title: iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB
products.description: iPhone 15 Pro Max with A17 Pro chip, 48MP camera system with 5x optical zoom, titanium design, and USB-C connectivity.

products.title: WD 2TB Elements Portable External Hard Drive
products.description: USB 3.0 portable external hard drive. Fast data transfers, high capacity storage compatible with Windows and Mac.

products.title: Acer 27-Inch Full HD IPS Monitor
products.description: 27-inch Full HD 1920x1080 IPS ultra-thin display with AMD Radeon FreeSync. Zero-frame design, 75Hz refresh rate, HDMI & VGA ports.

products.title: Samsung 49-Inch Curved Gaming Monitor
products.description: 49-inch Super Ultrawide 32:9 curved gaming monitor with 144Hz refresh rate, Quantum Dot technology, and HDR1000 support.

products.title: Men's Classic Slim Fit Dress Shirt
products.description: Premium cotton blend slim fit dress shirt. Wrinkle-resistant fabric with spread collar. Available in multiple colors. Machine washable.

products.title: Men's Slim-Fit Chino Pants
products.description: Classic slim-fit chino pants crafted from stretch cotton for all-day comfort. Perfect for casual or smart-casual occasions.

products.title: Men's Hooded Puffer Jacket
products.description: Lightweight yet warm puffer jacket with detachable hood. Water-resistant outer shell, zip pockets, and packable design.

products.title: Women's Faux Leather Moto Biker Jacket
products.description: Edgy faux leather moto jacket with zip detailing, snap collar, and belted waist. Pairs perfectly with jeans or a dress.

products.title: Women's Floral Wrap Midi Dress
products.description: Elegant floral wrap midi dress with V-neckline and flutter sleeves. Lightweight fabric perfect for spring and summer occasions.

products.title: Gold Diamond Pendant Necklace
products.description: 14K gold pendant necklace featuring a sparkling diamond solitaire. Comes with an 18-inch gold chain. Perfect gift for any occasion.

products.title: Silver Stackable Ring Set
products.description: Set of 5 sterling silver stackable rings with various textures and designs. Mix and match for a stylish layered look.

products.title: Rose Gold Charm Bracelet
products.description: Delicate rose gold plated charm bracelet with 7 charms including heart, star, and flower. Adjustable chain fits most wrist sizes.
